name: brain-sync
description: Bootstrap and use one attached local brain through the shared brain-sync MCP launcher.

interface.shortDescription: Use one local brain through the shared launcher
interface.longDescription: Bootstrap, attach, query, and administer one local brain through the shared brain-sync launcher and daemon-control seam.
defaultPrompt: Attach my local brain and show its current runtime status.
Search my brain and open the best matching area.
Start the shared daemon for the attached brain if needed.
